title: Protein Extraction for Amyloid Beta Fractionation
author: Lisa Blackmer-Raynolds
materials: 1x Homogenization Buffer (dilute day of): Dilute 5x Homogenization buffer to 1x in MiliQ Water and add 1 tablet protease inhibitor (cat#11697498001 Roche) per 10 mL

steps.title: 5x Homogenization Buffer (store 4 o C)
steps.instruction: 5x Homogenization Buffer (store 4 o C): 125 ml of 1.0 M Tris 30 ml of 0.5 M MgCl 2 25 ml of 0.1 M EDTA (pH to 7.2 and store at 4°C for up to 6 months) 20ml of MiliQ Water

steps.title: 1x Homogenization Buffer with 1% Triton X (dilute day of)
steps.instruction: 1x Homogenization Buffer with 1% Triton X (dilute day of): Add 1% Triton X-100 to 1x Homogenization buffer made above

steps.title: 70% Formic Acid (store RT) **Caution...
steps.instruction: 70% Formic Acid (store RT) **Caution Acidic** 7mL formic acid 3mL water
1.5x Homogenization Buffer pH 14 (store 4 o C) **Caution Corrosive** Dilute 5x Homogenization buffer to 1.5x in MiliQ Water and pH to 14

steps.title: Weigh frozen tissue sample and record for later normalization
steps.instruction: Weigh frozen tissue sample and record for later normalization

steps.title: Homogenize the tissue on ice using...
steps.instruction: Homogenize the tissue on ice using quick bursts of a sonicator in 400µl 1x Homogenization buffer

steps.title: Collect supernatant as tris soluble fraction...
steps.instruction: Collect supernatant as tris soluble fraction and store -80°C for later use

steps.title: Homogenize the pellet on ice using...
steps.instruction: Homogenize the pellet on ice using quick bursts of a sonicator in 200µl 1x Homogenization Buffer with 1% Triton X-100

steps.title: Collect supernatant as triton soluble fraction...
steps.instruction: Collect supernatant as triton soluble fraction and store -80°C for later use

steps.title: Homogenize the pellet on ice using...
steps.instruction: Homogenize the pellet on ice using quick bursts of a sonicator in 50µl 70% formic acid **Be careful with acid**

steps.title: Collect supernatant as formic acid soluble...
steps.instruction: Collect supernatant as formic acid soluble fraction and neutralize with 1.5x Homogenization buffer pH14 on ice *Be careful with acid and base**. Store -80°C for later use
